message:
Fix user message text wrapping and preserve whitespace

- web: Fix overflow for long text in user messages by adding min-w-0
  and break-all CSS classes
- web: Lazy load Streamdown to prevent SSR issues in Cloudflare Workers
- shared: Stop collapsing whitespace in user message text, preserving
  original newlines and formatting

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/5739ec67-7dfc-4fcc-a982-29848fb22cd6
